title: Tallon Christmas Rabbit in Snowy Forest Large Gift Bag – Festive Design with Red Side Panels, Ribbon Handle & Tag – Seasonal Gift Packaging
features: LARGE GIFT BAG – Spacious size ideal for larger or awkwardly shaped items such as clothing, books, toys, or boxed goods – measures approx. 33 x 26 x 14 cm.
FESTIVE WOODLAND DESIGN – Features a charming rabbit sitting in a snowy forest surrounded by berries and trees for a traditional seasonal feel.
PREMIUM FINISH – Includes rich red side panels, sturdy ribbon handle, and a matching tag for easy labelling and secure carrying.
REUSABLE & PRACTICAL – A durable and eco-friendly alternative to wrapping paper that can be used year after year.
SEASONAL PACKAGING – Perfect for presenting festive surprises to family, friends, neighbours, or colleagues.
description: Add charm to your seasonal celebrations with this large Christmas gift bag featuring a woodland rabbit in a snowy forest scene. The detailed artwork captures a festive winter atmosphere with snow-dusted trees, berries, and a beautifully illustrated rabbit, making it an ideal way to present your special seasonal surprises. The bag is finished with deep red side panels, a sturdy ribbon handle, and a coordinating tag, combining practicality with festive style. Perfect for wrapping bulky or awkwardly shaped items, this reusable gift bag is a sustainable alternative to wrapping paper, offering both durability and elegance. Whether for family, friends, or colleagues, this Tallon Christmas gift bag is designed to bring joy and festive cheer while saving you time on wrapping.
